phrases.intent_en: Ask if guided tours are available today
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay visitas guiadas disponibles hoy?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿ah-ee vee-SEE-tahs gee-AH-dahs dee-poh-NEE-bles OH-ee?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the special exhibition is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde se encuentra la exposición temporal?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh seh en-KWEN-trah lah eks-poh-see-SYOHN tem-poh-RAHL

likely_response.local: En la segunda planta, sala número tres.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH seh-GOON-dah PLAHN-tah SAH-lah NÚ-meh-roh TREHS
likely_response.translation_en: On the second floor, room number three.

responses.english: On the second floor, room number three.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH seh-GOON-dah PLAHN-tah SAH-lah NÚ-meh-roh TREHS
responses.french: En la segunda planta, sala número tres.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket desk is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la taquilla?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, po-DREE-ah een-dee-KAHR-me DON-deh es-TAH lah tah-KEE-yah?

likely_response.local: Junto a la entrada principal, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: The ticket desk is at the back, on the right.

responses.english: The ticket desk is at the back, on the right.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Junto a la entrada principal, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to join a tour group
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo puedo unirme a un grupo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh PWEH-doh oo-NEER-meh ah oon GROO-poh?

likely_response.local: Diríjase a recepción para apuntarse al próximo grupo.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-RÍ-hah-seh AH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN PAH-rah ah-poon-TAHR-seh AHL PRÓ-ksee-moh GROO-poh
likely_response.translation_en: You must book at the ticket desk before entering.

responses.english: You must book at the ticket desk before entering.
responses.phonetic: dee-RÍ-hah-seh AH reh-thehp-thee-ÓN PAH-rah ah-poon-TAHR-seh AHL PRÓ-ksee-moh GROO-poh
responses.french: Diríjase a recepción para apuntarse al próximo grupo.
